title: phaseolus rubidus
intro: Phaseolus rubidus, also known as the red bean or scarlet runner bean, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus rubidus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation due to its high fiber and antioxidant content. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus rubidus include improved heart health, reduced risk of certain cancers, and regulation of blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus rubidus can be made into tea, capsules, or dried powder, and are often used to promote cardiovascular well-being and digestive health.
